title: Continuous Pastels
description: Connected textures support for the Mortar (and Pastels) mod
body:
Simple resource pack that adds connected textures support to the stained glasses from [Mortar (and Pastels)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mortar). Requires [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (or another mod that supports the OptiFine connected textures format).

---

![Comparison of connected stained glass textures with resource pack (left) to unconnected stained glass textures without resource pack (right).](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/537ae392bcb55d5a71d996af5b8e584a88b3a3c8_0.webp)

![Showcase of different colors of stained glass along a wall with connected textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbc632af8a631717b4f975ff25db805ed8b17a49_0.webp)
*Why is this growing on my wall??*

---

Made with doggirl love! \:3c
